acceptance_criteria.text: Refresh result and refresh-job history expose typed reliability_state from existing parsequeue/worker fields.
proof: build_refresh_result_status and list_refresh_jobs include reliability_state in API payloads.

acceptance_criteria.text: Reliability state covers success, processing, retrying, captcha, failed, paused, completed-with-warnings, and known parser failure reasons.
proof: Reliability labels/explanations map parser reason codes from parsing_failure_taxonomy.
tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py covers timeout, retrying, captcha, and completed warnings.
gaps: Future parser reason codes fall back to unknown until explicitly mapped.

acceptance_criteria.text: Web Operator shows retry/captcha/error/warning counters and a user-facing explanation per refresh job.
proof: OperatorPage adds RefreshReliabilityState, renderReliabilityDetails, and summary counters.
gaps: No browser screenshot captured in this pass.

acceptance_criteria.text: Telegram refresh-job summaries include compact reliability information when a job needs attention.
proof: services.telegram_dashboard adds a Надёжность line for non-ok/non-processing jobs.
tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py asserts the Telegram reliability copy.
gaps: No live Telegram message was sent during verification.

acceptance_criteria.text: Feature stays read-only: no retry execution, no Apify start, no credit mutation, no external map writes.
proof: scripts/lint_backend_baseline.sh includes read-only guardrails for refresh reliability.
Docs state Sprint 42 does not retry, start Apify, mutate credits, publish replies, or write to external providers.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_refresh_result.py src/services/telegram_dashboard.py src/api/operator_api.py src/worker.py

PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py tests/test_operator_refresh_telegram_followup.py tests/test_worker_apify_settlement.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py
known_gaps: No production parse failure was manually triggered.
No browser screenshot captured; Vite build validates frontend compilation.
